resources.string: Nivra
Nivra
Nivra %1$s (Fork of Signal %2$s)
Nivra Messenger\nTerms & Privacy Policy
Not on Nivra yet?
https://Nivra.org/install
https://Nivra.org/donate
https://support.Nivra.org/hc/articles/360007059752
https://support.Nivra.org/hc/articles/9708267671322
https://support.Nivra.org/hc/articles/360007059752
https://support.Nivra.org/
https://Nivra.org/legal
https://support.Nivra.org/hc/articles/4408365318426#errors
https://support.Nivra.org/hc/articles/360007321171
https://Nivra.me/#u/%1$s
https://support.Nivra.org/hc/articles/5389476324250
https://support.Nivra.org/hc/articles/5538911756954
https://support.Nivra.org/hc/articles/360031949872#pending
https://support.Nivra.org/hc/articles/360031949872#donate
Nivra is updatingâ€¦
This will permanently unlock Nivra and message notifications.
Nivra needs permission to show your photos and videos
Nivra has limited access to photos or videos
No photos or videos found. Nivra only has access to photos and videos you selected.

Nivra requires the Storage permission in order to attach photos, videos, or audio, but it has been permanently denied. Please continue to the app settings menu, select \"Permissions\", and enable \"Storage\".

Nivra requires Contacts permission in order to attach contact information, but it has been permanently denied. Please continue to the app settings menu, select \"Permissions\", and enable \"Contacts\".
Nivra requires Location permission in order to attach a location, but it has been permanently denied. Please continue to the app settings menu, select \"Permissions\", and enable \"Location\".
Allow Nivra access to send your location.
Nivra needs location access to send your location.
Nivra needs access to show your photos and videos.
Enter your card details. Nivra does not collect or store your personal information.
Block getting Nivra updates and news.
Resume getting Nivra updates and news.
Nivra will be notified that this person may be sending spam. Nivra canâ€™t see the content of any chats.
Nivra will be notified that %1$s, who invited you to this group, may be sending spam. Nivra canâ€™t see the content of any chats.
Nivra will be notified that the person who invited you to this group may be sending spam. Nivra canâ€™t see the content of any chats.
To capture photos, allow Nivra access to the camera.
To capture photos and video, allow Nivra access to the camera.
To capture photos and video, allow Nivra access to the camera and microphone.
To capture videos with sound, allow Nivra access to your microphone.
To scan a QR code, allow Nivra access to the camera.
Nivra needs camera access to capture photos
Nivra needs camera access to scan QR codes
Nivra needs microphone access to capture video
To capture photos in Nivra:
To capture photos and videos in Nivra:
Nivra contacts
Nivra groups
Select Nivra recipients
No Nivra contacts
You can only use the camera button to send photos to Nivra contacts.
Invite a contact to join Nivra
You can now connect to the Nivra service directly for a better experience.
Update Nivra
Your version of Nivra has expired. You can view your message history but you won\'t be able to send or receive messages until you update.
Carrier charges may apply. The number you are calling is not registered with Nivra. This call will be placed through your mobile carrier, not over the internet.
To transfer this account to a new device, tap \"Continue\" and scan the QR code again with the Nivra camera. Make sure you only scan QR codes that come directly from Nivra.
Nivra Voice Call %s
Nivra Video Call %s
This message will not be encrypted because the recipient is no longer a Nivra user.\n\nSend unsecured message?
Nivra message
Let\'s switch to Nivra %1$s
To send voice messages, allow Nivra access to your microphone.
Nivra needs microphone access to record a voice message.
Nivra requires the Microphone permission in order to send audio messages, but it has been permanently denied. Please continue to app settings, select \"Permissions\", and enable \"Microphone\".

Nivra needs the Microphone and Camera permissions in order to call %s, but they have been permanently denied. Please continue to app settings, select \"Permissions\", and enable \"Microphone\" and \"Camera\".
To capture photos and video, allow Nivra access to the camera.
Nivra needs the Camera permission to take photos or video, but it has been permanently denied. Please continue to app settings, select \"Permissions\", and enable \"Camera\".
Nivra needs Camera permissions to take photos or video
Nivra needs microphone permissions to record videos, but they have been denied. Please continue to app settings, select \"Permissions\", and enable \"Microphone\" and \"Camera\".
Nivra needs microphone permissions to record videos.
To start a call, allow Nivra access to your microphone.
Nivra needs microphone access to start a call.
SMS messaging is no longer supported in Nivra.
SMS messaging is no longer supported in Nivra. Invite %1$s to Nivra to keep the conversation here.
This person is no longer using Nivra. Invite them to Nivra to keep the conversation here.
Invite to Nivra
Data (Nivra)
This message will be deleted for everyone in the chat if theyâ€™re on a recent version of Nivra. They will be able to see that you deleted a message.
Your safety number with %s changed, likely because they reinstalled Nivra or changed devices. Tap Verify to confirm the new safety number. This is optional.
Update Nivra
Re-register Nivra
Open Nivra
Nivra has been notified that this person may be sending spam. Nivra canâ€™t see the content of any chats.
The only official chat from Nivra. Keep up to date with news and release notes.
Don\'t respond to chats from Nivra
Nivra will never message you for your registration code, PIN, or recovery key. Never respond to a chat pretending to be Nivra.
Look out for the \"Name not verified\" notice. Everyone sets their own profile name in Nivra.
Don\'t respond to chats from Nivra

Nivra will never message you for your registration code, PIN, or recover key. Don\'t reply to chats pretending to be Nivra or Nivra Support. Bad actors set up fake chats to try to take over your account.
Look out for the \"Name not verified\" notice. Everyone sets their own profile name and photo in Nivra. If you\'re unsure who a new request is from it\'s safer to ignore it.
%s on Nivra are chosen by their account holder.
Nivra can\'t verify names and photos
Nivra will never contact you for your registration code, PIN, or recovery key
Anyone who has your phone number will see you\'re on Nivra and can start chats with you.
Nobody will be able to see you\'re on Nivra unless you message them or have an existing chat with them.
To restore a backup, install a new copy of Nivra. Open the app and tap "Restore backup", then locate a backup file. %1$s
Nivra requires external storage permission in order to create backups, but it has been permanently denied. Please continue to app settings, select \"Permissions\" and enable \"Storage\".

Nivra uses end-to-end encryption and it may need to refresh your chat session sometimes. This doesn\'t affect your chat\'s security, but you may have missed a message from this contact, and you can ask them to resend it.
Use this Nivra account on desktop or iPad.
Nivra on desktop or iPad
Nivra messages are synchronized with Nivra on your mobile phone after it is linked. Your previous message history will not appear.
On the device you want to link, visit %s to install Nivra
Nivra.org/download
Tap continue and enter your phone\'s lock to confirm. Do not enter your Nivra PIN.
https://support.Nivra.org/hc/articles/360007320551
Finish linking Nivra on your other device.
This device does not support Play Services. Tap to disable system battery optimizations that prevent Nivra from retrieving messages while inactive.
This version of Nivra has expired. Update now to send and receive messages.
Nivra no longer works on this device. To use Nivra again, update your device to a newer version of Android or switch to a newer device.
Update Nivra
This version of Nivra has expired. Tap to update to send and receive messages.
Permanent Nivra communication failure!
Nivra was unable to register with Google Play Services. Nivra messages and calls have been disabled, please try re-registering in Settings > Advanced.
Use this link to join a Nivra Call
Nivra encountered a problem. Submit debug log?
You can disable battery optimizations for Nivra to ensure that message notifications will not be delayed.
Disable battery optimizations for Nivra to ensure that message notifications will not be delayed. Tap â€œContinueâ€ to see device-specific instructions.
Restarting your device may help solve the message delivery issue. If this problem continues, contact Nivra support.
https://support.Nivra.org/hc/articles/360007318711#android_notifications_troubleshooting
You\'ve selected a contact that doesn\'t support Nivra groups, so this group will be MMS. Custom MMS group names and photos will only be visible to you.

You\'ve selected a contact that doesn\'t support Nivra groups, this group will be MMS. Custom MMS group names and photos will only be visible to you. Support for MMS groups will be removed soon to focus on encrypted messaging.
Someone you added does not support new groups and needs to update Nivra
Someone you added does not support announcement groups and needs to update Nivra
This is an insecure MMS Group. To chat privately, invite your contacts to Nivra.
This version of Nivra can\'t restore your backup. Update to the latest version and try again.
Update Nivra
This is likely because you registered your Nivra account on a different device.
Update Nivra to use group links
The version of Nivra youâ€™re using does not support this group link. Update to the latest version to join this group via link.
Update Nivra
Invite to Nivra
Let\'s switch to Nivra: %1$s
Nivra
Verify your Nivra PIN
Establishing Nivra call
Starting Nivra call service
Stopping Nivra call service
Received a message encrypted using an old version of Nivra that is no longer supported. Please ask the sender to update to the most recent version and resend the message.
%s is on Nivra!
Like this new feature? Help support Nivra with a one-time donation.
You will no longer be able to send SMS messages from Nivra soon. Invite %1$s to Nivra to keep the conversation here.
You can no longer send SMS messages in Nivra. Invite %1$s to Nivra to keep the conversation here.
%1$s sent you a message that can\'t be processed or displayed because it uses a new Nivra feature.
https://support.Nivra.org/hc/articles/360007459591
Nivra will never
Link a Nivra device?
To link a desktop or iPad to this Nivra account, go to Linked Devices and tap \"Link a New Device\" and scan the QR code again. Make sure you only scan QR codes that come directly from Nivra.
Nivra needs the Camera permission in order to scan a QR code, but it has been permanently denied. Please continue to app settings, select \"Permissions\", and enable \"Camera\".
This version of Nivra will expire today. Update to the most recent version.
Nivra icon
Unlock Nivra
Nivra Android - Lock Screen
Nivra Registration - Need Help with PIN for Android

You\'ve run out of PIN guesses, but you can still access your Nivra account by creating a new PIN. For your privacy and security your account will be restored without any saved profile information or settings.
https://support.Nivra.org/hc/articles/360007059792
Nivra Registration - Need Help with reregister PIN for Android
You\'ve run out of PIN guesses, but you can still access your Nivra account by creating a new PIN.
If you disable the PIN, you will lose all data when you re-register Nivra unless you manually back up and restore. You cannot turn on Registration Lock while the PIN is disabled.
To help prevent spam on Nivra, please complete verification.
Nivra call
To call %1$s, Nivra needs access to your camera
Nivra %1$s
To start or join a call, allow Nivra access to your camera and microphone.
To start or join a call, allow Nivra access to your microphone.
To enable your video, allow Nivra access to your camera.
Nivra needs microphone permissions to start or join a call.
Nivra needs camera access to enable your video
Nivra Call
Nivra Video Call
Nivra call link
Nivra will ring %1$s
Nivra will ring %1$s and %2$s
Nivra connection

This device is missing Google Play Services. You can still use Nivra, but this configuration may result in reduced reliability or performance.\n\nIf you are not an advanced user, are not running an aftermarket Android ROM, or believe that you are seeing this in error, please contact support@Nivra.org for help troubleshooting.

Nivra needs the contacts and media permissions to help you connect with friends and send messages. Your contacts are uploaded using Nivra\'s private contact discovery, which means they are end-to-end encrypted and never visible to the Nivra service.

Nivra needs the contacts permission to help you connect with friends. Your contacts are uploaded using Nivra\'s private contact discovery, which means they are end-to-end encrypted and never visible to the Nivra service.
Nivra Android - Phone Number Format
â€¢ Make sure your phone has a cellular Nivra to receive your SMS or call\n â€¢ Confirm you can receive a phone call to the number\n â€¢ Check that you have entered your phone number correctly.
If you forget your Nivra PIN when registering with Nivra again, youâ€™ll be locked out of your account for 7 days.
Invite to Nivra
Nivra Message
Nivra Call
Invite to Nivra
Nivra Message
Nivra artist series
support@Nivra.org
Nivra version:
Nivra package:
%s is on Nivra!
Nivra update
A new version of Nivra is available. Tap to update.
Nivra failed to update
Nivra successfully updated
Your contact is running a newer version of Nivra with an incompatible QR code format. Please update to compare.
Our Nivra safety number:
Nivra needs the Camera permission in order to scan a QR code, but it has been permanently denied. Please continue to app settings, select \"Permissions\", and enable \"Camera\".
Nivra is unlocked
Lock Nivra
Verify to continue messaging on Nivra.
Nivra Message
Turn off contact joined Nivra notifications? You can enable them again in Nivra > Settings > Notifications.
Contact joined Nivra
Quick response unavailable when Nivra is locked!
Nivra needs the Storage permission in order to save to external storage, but it has been permanently denied. Please continue to app settings, select \"Permissions\", and enable \"Storage\".
Nivra
This device is no longer registered. This is likely because you registered your phone number with Nivra on a different device.
You have been logged out of Nivra on this device.
Update Nivra to continue using payments. Your balance may not be up-to-date.
To answer the call, give Nivra access to your microphone.
To answer the video call, give Nivra access to your microphone and camera.

Nivra requires Microphone and Camera permissions in order to make or receive calls, but they have been permanently denied. Please continue to app settings, select \"Permissions\", and enable \"Microphone\" and \"Camera\".
Invite to Nivra
Find people you know on Nivra

Nivra requires the Contacts permission in order to display your contacts, but it has been permanently denied. Please continue to the app settings menu, select \"Permissions\", and enable \"Contacts\".
"%1$s" is not a Nivra user. Please check the username and try again.
Nivra groups can have a maximum of %1$s members.
Nivra groups perform best with %1$s members or fewer. Adding more members will cause delays sending and receiving messages.
To find people you know on Nivra:
Allow access to your contacts. Your contacts are encrypted and not visible to the Nivra service.
Nivra needs access to your contacts in order to display them.
Nivra message
Bubbles are an Android feature that you can turn off for Nivra chats.
Your safety number with %1$s has changed and is no longer verified. This could either mean that someone is trying to intercept your communication, or that %1$s simply reinstalled Nivra.
Your safety numbers with %1$s and %2$s are no longer verified. This could either mean that someone is trying to intercept your communication, or that they simply reinstalled Nivra.
Your safety numbers with %1$s, %2$s, and %3$s are no longer verified. This could either mean that someone is trying to intercept your communication, or that they simply reinstalled Nivra.

Nivra requires MMS settings to deliver media and group messages through your wireless carrier. Your device does not make this information available, which is occasionally true for locked devices and other restrictive configurations.
https://support.Nivra.org/hc/articles/360007459591
Update Nivra
This version of Nivra has expired. Update now to continue using Nivra.
https://support.Nivra.org/hc/articles/10223569377562

For contacts youâ€™re connected to by phone number, Nivra can automatically confirm whether the connection is secure using a process called key transparency. For added security, verify end-to-end encryption manually by comparing the numbers on the previous screen or scanning the code on their device.

Nivra can no longer automatically verify the encryption for this chat. This is likely because %1$s changed their phone number. Verify end-to-end encryption manually by comparing the numbers on the previous screen or scanning the code on their device.

Nivra can only automatically verify the encryption in chats where youâ€™re connected to someone via a phone number. If the chat was started with a username or a group in common, verify end-to-end encryption by comparing the numbers on the previous screen or scanning the code on their device.
Nivra can now auto-verify encryption

For contacts youâ€™re connected to by phone number, Nivra can automatically confirm whether the connection is secure using a process called key transparency. For added security, you can still verify connections manually using a QR code or safety number.
https://support.Nivra.org/hc/articles/360007318591
https://support.Nivra.org
Nivra Android Support Request
Nivra Android Debug Log Submission
Auto-lock Nivra after a specified time interval of inactivity
Donate to Nivra
Nivra will need to close to change the app icon and name. Notifications will always display the default Nivra icon and name.
Select an app icon and name, which will be visible on your phone\'s home screen and app drawer. Notifications will always display the default Nivra icon and name. Learn\u00A0more
Notifications will always display the default Nivra icon and name.
If you disable the PIN, you will lose all data when you re-register Nivra unless you manually back up and restore. You can not turn on Registration Lock while the PIN is disabled.
PINs keep information stored with Nivra encrypted so only you can access it. Your profile, settings, and contacts will restore when you reinstall. You wonâ€™t need your PIN to open the app.
Nivra messages and calls
Free private messages and calls to Nivra users
https://support.Nivra.org/hc/articles/360055276112
Relay all calls through the Nivra server to avoid revealing your IP address to your contact. Enabling will reduce call quality.
If enabled, Nivra will attempt to circumvent censorship. Do not enable this feature unless you are in a location where Nivra is censored.
Censorship circumvention is not necessary; you are already connected to the Nivra service.
Only use a proxy if you\'re not able to connect to Nivra on mobile data or Wi-Fi.
When enabled, Nivra will attempt to automatically verify the encryption of 1:1 chats.
Use Nivra to send and receive MobileCoin, a new privacy focused digital currency. Activate to get started.
You will not be able to send or receive MobileCoin in Nivra if you deactivate payments.
https://support.Nivra.org/hc/articles/360057625692#payments_activate

You can use Nivra to send and receive MobileCoin. All payments are subject to the Terms of Use for MobileCoins and the MobileCoin Wallet. You may encounter some issues and payments or balances you may lose can\'t be recovered.
Payments in Nivra is no longer available. You can still transfer funds to an exchange but you can no longer send and receive payments or add funds.
https://support.Nivra.org/hc/articles/360057625692#payments_transfer_from_exchange
https://support.Nivra.org/hc/articles/360057625692#payments_details
https://support.Nivra.org/hc/articles/360057625692#payments_details_fees
You can\'t transfer to your own Nivra wallet address. Enter the wallet address from your account at a supported exchange.
To scan a QR code, Nivra needs access to the camera.
Nivra needs the Camera permission to capture a QR code. Go to settings, select \"Permissions\", and enable \"Camera\".
To scan a QR code, Nivra needs access to the camera.
https://support.Nivra.org/hc/articles/360057625692#payments_currency_conversion
Nivra
Nivra call
Nivra video call
Nivra is experiencing technical difficulties. We are working hard to restore service as quickly as possible.
Nivra\'s private contact discovery temporarily can\'t process your phone\'s contacts.
Nivra\'s private contact discovery can\'t process your phone\'s contacts.
https://support.Nivra.org/hc/articles/360007059792
PINs can help you restore your account and keep your info encrypted with Nivra.
Nivra PIN
PINs keep information stored with Nivra encrypted so only you can access it. Your profile, settings, and contacts will restore when you reinstall. You won\'t need your PIN to open the app.
https://support.Nivra.org/hc/articles/360007059792
Enter your Nivra PIN
https://support.Nivra.org/hc/articles/360007059792
Nivra Registration - Need Help with PIN for Android (v2 PIN)
PINs keep information thatâ€™s stored with Nivra encrypted.
Update Nivra PIN
Update your Nivra PIN to complete account registration.
Incoming Nivra voice call
Incoming Nivra video call
Incoming Nivra group call
Ongoing Nivra voice call
Ongoing Nivra video call
Ongoing Nivra group call
Migrating Nivra database
Cannot import backups from newer versions of Nivra
Creating Nivra backupâ€¦
Verifying Nivra backupâ€¦
Contact Nivra Support
Nivra Registration - Verification Code for Android
Choose who can see your phone number and who can contact you on Nivra with it.
Anyone who has your phone number will see you\'re on Nivra and can start chats with you.
Nobody will be able to see you\'re on Nivra unless you message them or have an existing chat with them.
Setting \"Who can find me by number\" to \"Nobody\" will make it harder for people to find you on Nivra.
Lock Nivra access with Android screen lock or fingerprint
Nivra PIN
Confirm your Nivra PIN
Make sure you memorize or securely store your PIN as it can\'t be recovered. If you forget your PIN, you may lose data when re-registering your Nivra account.
Unlock Nivra
Use your Android device lock settings to unlock Nivra.

Screen lock is on and Nivra is safely secured with your device lock settings. Unlock Nivra the same way as you would normally unlock your phone, this could be with Face Unlock, Fingerprint Unlock, a PIN, password or pattern.
Your Android device lock settings will be required to unlock Nivra when you leave or switch apps. When locked, notification previews will not show message content.
Use Nivra screen lock
Turn off Nivra screen lock
Update Nivra
If you have previously registered a Nivra account, you can transfer or restore your account and messages
Restore Nivra backup
Open Nivra on your old Android phone
Nivra needs the location permission to discover and connect to your old Android device.
Nivra needs location services enabled to discover and connect with your old Android device.
Nivra needs Wi-Fi on to discover and connect with your old Android device. Wi-Fi needs to be on but it does not have to be connected to a Wi-Fi network.

Sorry, it appears this device does not support Wi-Fi Direct. Nivra uses Wi-Fi Direct to discover and connect with your old Android device. You can still restore a backup to restore your account from your old Android device.
Nivra needs the location permission to discover and connect to your new Android device.
Nivra needs location services enabled to discover and connect with your new Android device.
Nivra needs Wi-Fi on to discover and connect with your new Android device. Wi-Fi needs to be on but it does not have to be connected to a Wi-Fi network.

Sorry, it appears this device does not support Wi-Fi Direct. Nivra uses Wi-Fi Direct to discover and connect with your new Android device. You can still create a backup to restore your account on your new Android device.
Cannot transfer from a newer versions of Nivra
Keep both devices near each other. Do not turn off the devices and keep Nivra open. Transfers are end-to-end encrypted.
Download Nivra on your new Android device
Your Nivra data has been transferred to your new device. To complete the transfer process, you must continue registration on your new device.
Your Nivra account has been transferred to your new device, but you must complete registration on it to continue. Nivra will be inactive on this device.
Legacy Groups can\'t yet be upgraded to New Groups, but you can create a New Group with the same members if they\'re on the latest version of Nivra.
Nivra will offer a way to upgrade Legacy Groups in the future.
Share via Nivra
This will delete your Nivra account and reset the application. The app will close after the process is complete.
You can add funds for use in Nivra by sending MobileCoin to your wallet address.
https://support.Nivra.org/hc/articles/360057625692#payments_which_ones
https://support.Nivra.org/hc/articles/360057625692#payments_transfer_from_exchange
https://support.Nivra.org/hc/articles/360057625692#payments_transfer_to_exchange

It\'s recommended that you transfer your funds to another wallet address before deactivating payments. If you choose not to transfer your funds now, they will remain in your wallet linked to Nivra if you reactivate payments.
Your balance will remain in your wallet linked to Nivra if you choose to reactivate payments.
https://support.Nivra.org/hc/articles/360057625692#payments_deactivate
https://support.Nivra.org/hc/articles/360057625692#payments_wallet_view_passphrase
https://support.Nivra.org/hc/articles/360057625692#payments_wallet_restore_passphrase
https://support.Nivra.org/hc/articles/360007459591
Renew your Nivra Secure Backups subscription
Require your Nivra PIN to register your phone number with Nivra again
Export a report of your Nivra account data. This report does not include any messages or media. %1$s
Only share your Nivra account data with people or apps you trust.
Your report is generated only at the time of export and is not stored by Nivra on your device.
Nivra Change Number - Need Help with PIN for Android (v2 PIN)
Contact joins Nivra
Nivra messages and calls, always relay calls, and sealed sender
https://Nivra.org/blog/sealed-sender
Copyright Nivra Messenger
Nivra is a 501c3 nonprofit
Donate to Nivra
Nivra is powered by people like you. Donate monthly and receive a badge.
Nivra is powered by people like you. Donate and receive a badge.
Get badges for your profile by supporting Nivra. Tap on a badge to learn more.
%1$s is not a Nivra user
It looks like you\'re trying to link a Nivra device. Tap continue and then tap \"Link a New Device\" and scan the QR code again.
%1$s supports Nivra
%1$s supports Nivra with a monthly donation. Nivra is a nonprofit with no advertisers or investors, supported only by people like you.
%1$s supports Nivra with a donation. Nivra is a nonprofit with no advertisers or investors, supported only by people like you.
As an independent nonprofit, Nivra is committed to private messaging and calls. No ads, no trackers, no surveillance. Donate today to support Nivra.
No ads, no trackers, no surveillance. Donate today to support Nivra.
Nivra is a 501c3 nonprofit. US donations are tax deductible.
You\'ve earned a donor badge from Nivra! Display it on your profile to show off your support.
Get badges for your profile by supporting Nivra.
Nivra is a nonprofit with no advertisers or investors, supported only by people like you.
Donate to Nivra
Update Nivra
This version of Nivra has expired. Update now to continue using Nivra.
This device is no longer registered. Re-register to continue using Nivra on this device.
You can keep using Nivra but to support technology that is built for you, consider becoming a sustainer by making a monthly donation.
You can keep using Nivra but to support the app and reactivate your badge, renew now.

We\'re having trouble collecting your Nivra Sustainer payment. Make sure your payment method is up to date. If it isn\'t, update it in Google Pay. Nivra will try to process the payment again in a few days.
Your donation was processed but Nivra could not send your donation message. Please contact support.
Your device doesn\'t support in-app donations, so you can\'t subscribe to earn a badge. You can still support Nivra by making a donation on our website.
This user can\'t receive donations until they upgrade Nivra.
%1$s donated to Nivra on your behalf
To enable notifications, Nivra needs permission to display them.
Nivra Release Notes & News
This is the official and only chat from Nivra
Official and only Nivra chat
If you have reinstalled Nivra, receipts from previous donations will not be available.

Thank you for supporting Nivra. Your contribution helps fuel the mission of developing open source privacy technology that protects free expression and enables secure global communication for millions around the world. If youâ€™re a resident of the United States, please retain this receipt for your tax records. Nivra Technology Foundation is a taxâ€“exempt nonprofit organization in the United States under section 501c3 of the Internal Revenue Code. Our Federal Tax ID is 82â€“4506840.
All Nivra connections
Nivra Connections
Nivra Connections are people you\'ve chosen to trust, either by:
%1$s made a donation to Nivra on your behalf! Show your support for Nivra on your profile.
You\'ve made a donation to Nivra on behalf of %1$s. They\'ll be given the option to show their support on their profile.

Donate to support private messaging. Keep Nivra independent and ad-free.

Donate %1$s to Nivra
Leave Nivra to confirm donation?
When confirmed, return to Nivra to finish processing your donation.
You\'ll be sent to %1$s. When confirmed, return to Nivra to finish processing your donation.
Stripe processes donations made to Nivra. Nivra does not collect or store your personal information. %1$s
Enter your bank details. Nivra does not collect or store your personal information. %1$s
The number of contacts on your phone exceeds the limit Nivra can process. To find contacts on Nivra, consider removing contacts or accounts on your phone that are syncing a lot of contacts.
Nivra does not collect or store any of your personal information when you make a donation.
Nivra does not and cannot connect your donation to your Nivra account.

Share a link for a Nivra call

Nivra call
Share link via Nivra
Scan this QR code with your phone to chat with me on Nivra.
Try scanning another image containing a Nivra QR code.
Turn on Nivra Secure Backups
Never lose a message when you get a new phone or reinstall Nivra.
Turn on Nivra Secure Backups to preserve your messages and media.
Paid Nivra Secure Backup plans keep all your media, up to 100GB.
Paid Nivra Secure Backup plans save all media you send and receive, up to a maximum of 100GB. Never lose a photo or video when you get a new phone or reinstall Nivra.
Thanks for supporting Nivra
This could take a while. You can use Nivra normally while backing up.
Optimize Nivra storage
To restore a backup, install a new copy of Nivra. Open the app and tap "Restore backup", then locate a backup file.
Invite to Nivra
%1$s is not a Nivra user. Please check the username and try again.
%1$s is not a Nivra user. Would you like to invite this number?
Nicknames & notes are stored with Nivra and end-to-end encrypted. They are only visible to you.
To finish downloading your Nivra Backup your device needs %1$s of storage space.
You\'ll continue to have access to the free Nivra Secure Backups plan.
An error occurred and your backup could not be completed. Make sure you\'re on the latest version of Nivra and try again. If this problem persists, contact support.
Re-registered your Nivra account too many times.
Your last backup couldn\'t be completed. Make sure you\'re on the latest version of Nivra and try again.
To subscribe to Nivra Secure backups, you need to install Google Play services on your phone.
To subscribe to Nivra Secure backups please wait for Google Play services to finish updating.
To subscribe to Nivra Secure Backups, update Google Play service on your phone.
To subscribe to Nivra Secure Backups, enable Google Play services on your phone and sign into the Google Play store.
You can\'t subscribe to Nivra Secure backups because your phone does not support Google Play services. Contact the phone manufacturer for assistance.
Storage optimization can only be used with the paid tier of Nivra Secure Backups. Your backups subscription is still processing and not yet active. Please try again later.
Storage optimization can only be used with the paid tier of Nivra Secure Backups. Upgrade your backup plan to start using this feature.
To start backing up all your media, enable Nivra Secure Backups and choose the paid tier.
Automatic backups with Nivra\'s secure end-to-end encrypted storage service.
Nivra Secure Backups
Back up your message history so you never lose data when you get a new phone or reinstall Nivra.
Backups have been turned off and your data has been deleted from Nivra\'s secure storage service.
Your subscription was not found on this device. Renew to continue using Nivra Secure Backups.
Backups have been turned off, but there was an error deleting your data from Nivra\'s secure storage service.
Backups have been turned off, your data will download to your device and then be deleted from Nivra\'s secure storage service.
Backups have been turned off and your data will be deleted from Nivra\'s secure storage service.
Backups have been turned off and your data has been deleted from Nivraâ€™s secure storage service.
Back up your messages and media using Nivra\'s secure, end-to-end encrypted storage service. Never lose a message when you get a new phone or reinstall Nivra.
Your recovery key is a 64-character code that lets you restore your backups when you re-install Nivra.
This is the same as your Nivra Secure Backups recovery key.
Restore a Nivra Secure Backup
Restore your Nivra Secure Backup
Only store your recovery key in a password manager that you trust is secure. Nivra does not make a recommendation on which password manager is right for you.
Nivra Secure Backups
You previously chose not to save passwords for Nivra to Google Password Manager. In your Google Password Manager settings, remove Nivra from \"Declined sites and apps\" and try again.
Nivra will not be able to help you restore your backup if you lose your key. Store it somewhere safe and secure, and do not share it with others.
All backups are end-to-end encrypted. Nivra is a non-profitâ€”paying for backups helps support our mission.
Thanks for supporting Nivra!
To subscribe to Nivra Secure Backups, you must have Google Services enabled on your phone and be signed into the Google Play Store.
Scan a QR code from your current Nivra account to get started quickly
Or you\'re reinstalling Nivra on the same device
Get your Nivra account and message history onto this device.
Restore Nivra backup
Restore your text messages and media from your Nivra backup plan.
Backups can\'t be recovered without their 64-character recovery code. If you\'ve lost your recovery key Nivra can\'t help restore your backup.
Make sure you\'re registering with the same phone number and 64-character recovery key you saved when enabling Nivra Secure Backups. Backups can not be recovered without this key.

You may have entered your recovery key incorrectly, or you have not completed at least one backup on your old device.\n\nMake sure youâ€™re registering with the same phone number and recovery key you saved when enabling Nivra Secure Backups, and confirm that your old device has completed a backup.
Nivra Android Backup restore network error
Android NivraBackups Import Failed
Nivra Android Backup restore permanent failure
Android NivraBackups Import Permanent Failure
The backup you are restoring was created using a different Nivra account. You can restore this backup to a new account, but you will no longer be a member of any groups that were restored.
Nivra Android Backup export network error
Android NivraBackups Export Failed
Open Nivra on your old device
Your Nivra account and messages are ready to restore on your other device. Nivra is now inactive on this device.
Your Nivra account and messages have been transferred to your other device. Nivra is now inactive on this device.
Because you\'re moving from iPhone to Android, the only way to transfer your messages and media is by enabling Nivra Secure Backups on your old device.
Open Nivra on your old device
You\'ve reached your backup storage limit. Free up space in Nivra to continue backing up chats and media.
Please include any details relevant to the issue. Anything you share here will be kept private and will only be used to help improve calls in Nivra.
This helps us improve calls in Nivra. No personally identifiable information will be stored.
To try again, uninstall and re-install Nivra on this device, and choose \"Restore or transfer\".
